reason: All four FR-08 acceptance criteria are fully met. (1) create() writes a record with conversation_id + reason into the in-memory escalation_queue (_records dict), returning an auto-incremented escalation_id. (2) assign() sets assigned_agent and picked_at on the matching record, raising KeyError for unknown IDs. (3) resolve() sets resolved_at on the matching record, raising KeyError for unknown IDs. (4) Phase 1 has no SLA tracking — sla_deadline field exists on EscalationRecord but is initialised to None by default and is never populated by any Phase 1 code path. Tests cover all three lifecycle operations plus ID increment, conversation_id/reason storage, and the created_at timestamp type. No regressions observed.
